name: Klossel Suppe (Dumpling Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter, add egg yolks, salt, parsley, and nutmeg; mix well.
2. Add bread crumbs and beaten egg whites. Mix until a dough forms.
3. With hands dipped in flour, roll dough into small balls, about the size of a walnut.
4. Cook slowly, uncovered, in beef broth for 10 minutes. Alternatively, cook in pea soup or rice soup.
